title: Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Analytics)
content: The Diploma in Data Science and Analytics offers students the opportunity to advance their careers and gain skills for the new digital economy. Designed for working professionals, the curriculum emphasizes collaboration, experiential learning and team building to solve data-driven challenges. Students will learn interdisciplinary data collection and examination techniques, data visualization, statistical and computational analytics, presentation skills, and how to apply the fundamental core concepts, and tools of data thinking to their work in any industry or sector. 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology. 01 This course aims to develop data handling, statistical analysis, and visualization skills in students. The program focuses on extracting meaningful insights from large datasets using modern tools and technologies. It prepares students for data-driven roles in industries by promoting critical thinking and data interpretation for informed decision-making. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 Communication: An ability to communicate effectively. 10 01 02 03 01 02 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology.
